alert.summary: checkout-api p99 latency above SLO (1200ms > 500ms) for 10m

metrics.name: db_query_duration_p95_ms
metrics.description: p95 duration of downstream orders-db queries

metrics.name: requests_per_second
metrics.description: Throughput (roughly flat — not a traffic spike)

logs.message: slow query detected: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id=? (no index on user_id)
downstream orders-db response time 812ms exceeds budget 200ms
request timeout waiting on orders-db connection (waited 1000ms)

expected_root_cause.summary: Slow downstream orders-db queries (missing index on orders.user_id) drive checkout-api p99 latency over SLO; traffic is flat, so this is a dependency/query problem, not load.
key_signals: db_query_duration_p95_ms rises in lockstep with request latency
requests_per_second stays flat (rules out traffic spike)
